# close

Close app or end session

## Usage

```bash
agent-device close [app] [--save-script [path]] [--shutdown]
```

## Session Requirement

Requires an active session to close it.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--save-script [path]`: Save session script (.ad) on close; optional custom output path
- `--shutdown`: close: shutdown associated iOS simulator after ending session

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
